rows.description: Computus Francisci Wolbor Rectoris à 2do die Novembris 1757 ad eundem Diem revolutum 1758.
rows.notes: Description taken from gemini-flash, with 'Wolbor' and 'Diem' visually verified as accurate. gpt-5-mini had 'Webber' and 'diem'.
rows.section_header: Computus Francisci Wolbor Rectoris à 2do die Novembris 1757 ad eundem Diem revolutum 1758.

rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors for description, type, and empty amounts. Visually confirmed.

rows.description: Longwittonham pro Dim. ad Gust. mic.
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent across both extractors. Description 'Gust. mic.' from gpt-5-mini is visually more accurate than 'Fest. mic.' from gemini-flash.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year rent from Long Wittenham, payable at Michaelmas, amounting to £40 13s 5d.

rows.notes: This row was missed by gemini-flash entirely. gpt-5-mini correctly identified a separate entry for '32 5 0' (gpt-5-mini R4), although its description was incomplete. Visually confirmed as 'Yardington arrear pro Rect' with amounts 32 pounds, 5 shillings, 0 pence.
rows.english_description: Arrear rent from Yardington apportioned to the rector.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear rent from Yardington apportioned to the rector, amounting to £32 5s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts (18 6 7) are consistent between the extractors for this line (gemini-flash R4, gpt-5-mini R5). gemini-flash correctly identified the fraction as 0.25 ('q'), while gpt-5-mini identified it as 0.5 with uncertainty. Visually confirmed description 'Yardington arrear pro Gonom.' and fraction 'q' (0.25).
rows.english_description: Arrear from Yardington apportioned to the (uncertain) 'Gonom' account or recipient.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear from Yardington apportioned to the 'Gonom' account, amounting to £18 6s 7.25d.
